title: thelypteris sudestica
intro: Thelypteris sudestica, also known as the tropical lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris sudestica include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be decocted in water or made into a poultice to apply topically, or used as a tea to drink for its medicinal benefits.
